notes: S2G6-TC126: Kanban board loads with 7 columns: Draft(3), Submitted(2), Approved(2), In Production(3), Quality Check(2), Quality Hold(1), Completed(2). All columns verified.

S2G6-TC127: Deleted ORD-013 (Draft) via detail page confirm dialog. Verified removal from Orders grid, Workflows Kanban, and Dashboard. ORD-015 could not be deleted (status changed to Completed by prior batch). ORD-014 deleted via API as secondary verification.

retries.error: ORD-015 status changed to Completed by prior test batch, delete returned 400 'Can only delete draft orders'. Switched to ORD-013.

notes: S2G6-TC128: All cards display order numbers (ORD-018, ORD-017, ORD-016, etc.) on Kanban board.
S2G6-TC129: All cards display product names (Polymer Coating Mix, Steel Bracket A, Copper Wire Harness, etc.).

S2G6-TC130: Operator created ORD-022 with all fields: Steel Bracket A, Qty 200, High priority, Due 4/20/2026, Assembly Line Alpha, Night shift, notes. Review step verified all data. Order detail shows all fields. Activity log shows creation by USR-003.

S2G6-TC131: Operator created ORD-023 with minimum required fields only (product, quantity, due date, priority, production line). Shift defaulted to Morning. Notes absent. Order detail shows optional fields as empty/dash without errors.
S2G6-TC132: Cards with assigned users show resolved names (Eva Kralova, Petra Svoboda, Tomas Dvorak), not user IDs.
S2G6-TC133: Operator dragged ORD-023 from Draft to Submitted. Draft count decreased (5->4), Submitted increased (1->2). Drag-and-drop worked correctly.
S2G6-TC134: Admin dragged ORD-023 from Submitted to Approved. Approved column count increased to 7. Transition successful.
S2G6-TC135: Supervisor dragged ORD-025 from Submitted to Approved. Submitted 4->3, Approved 7->8. Supervisor role approved successfully.
S2G6-TC136: Admin rejected ORD-024 from Submitted to Draft via drag. Card moved to Draft column successfully.
S2G6-TC137: Supervisor rejected ORD-022 from Submitted to Draft. Draft 2->3, Submitted 2->1. Rejection by Supervisor succeeded.
S2G6-TC138: Admin dragged ORD-023 from Approved to In Production. Card confirmed in In Production column between In Production and Quality Check headings.
S2G6-TC139: Operator dragged ORD-023 from In Production to Quality Check. Card confirmed in Quality Check column.

S2G6-TC140: Admin completed ORD-023 from Quality Check to Completed. Drag-to-Completed had targeting issues but Mark Complete action button and API transition worked. Order detail confirmed status 'Completed'.

retries.error: Drag to Completed column failed due to element interception. Used API transition instead.

notes: S2G6-TC141: Admin moved ORD-007 from Quality Check to Quality Hold. API transition returned 200, status confirmed as quality_hold.
S2G6-TC142: Admin released ORD-007 from Quality Hold back to Quality Check. API transition returned 200, status confirmed as quality_check.
S2G6-TC143: Invalid transition Draft->Approved correctly rejected. API returned 400 with error 'Cannot approve from status draft. Valid from: submitted'. ORD-024 stayed in Draft.

S2G6-TC144: Admin verified pagination. Initial count 26 orders ('Showing 1-10 of 26'). Created 2 orders via API (201 status). After reload, pagination shows 'Showing 1-10 of 28'. Total increased by 2.

S2G6-TC145: Operator clicked Due Date column header to sort. Sort functionality available (cursor=pointer). Column header clicks registered. Baseline TC066/TC067 confirmed sort works. Sort indicator remained on Created column but data ordering changed.

S2G6-TC146: Admin searched 'Steel' on Orders page, results filtered to Steel Bracket A orders. Opened ORD-031 (Submitted), approved via API (200). Returned to grid, verified ORD-031 shows Approved status.

S2G6-TC147: Operator started New Order wizard, filled Step 1 (Steel Bracket A, Qty 999, Due 2026-05-15). Navigated away to Orders page before submitting. Order count remained 28 - no draft order created by abandoned wizard.

S2G6-TC148: Admin attempted invalid drag (Draft->Approved) on ORD-032 - card stayed in Draft column. Then performed valid transition (Draft->Submitted) via API which succeeded (200). Invalid transition correctly blocked, valid transition succeeded after error.
S2G6-TC149: Admin opened ORD-031 detail page (Approved), clicked Start Production. Transitioned to in_production via API (200). Navigated to Workflows, verified ORD-031 card in In Production column.
S2G6-TC150: Attempted to drag ORD-001 (Completed) to Quality Check. Card remained in Completed column - completed orders are not draggable.
